site.title: Glenn Laciapag
site.description: Data engineer specializing in Python, SQL, Power BI, and AWS.

hero.name: Glenn
hero.tagline: I build robust data pipelines & synthesize complex datasets 🧪
hero.description: Data engineer with a focus on Python, SQL, and AWS. Currently bridging traditional data engineering with modern AI applications and emerging technologies.

paragraphs: I am a chemist turned data engineer, passionate about building robust data pipelines and synthesizing complex datasets. My current work revolves around Python, SQL, and AWS (Lambda, Glue, Redshift).

I am currently pursuing a Professional Master in Data Science (Analytics) at UP Diliman, and my focus is on the intersection of data engineering and AI, utilizing intelligent systems to drive measurable business value.

experience.description: Lead the design and implementation of cloud-native data pipelines on AWS, processing millions of records daily. Driving the adoption of LLM-powered data products.
Built and maintained ETL pipelines for a SaaS analytics platform. Migrated on-premise data warehouse to Redshift, reducing query times by 60%.
Created dashboards and reports to support business decisions. Automated recurring reporting workflows with Python, saving 10+ hours per week.

footer: © 2026 Glenn. Built with plain HTML, CSS & JS using Claude Code. Hosted on GitHub Pages.
